strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum

Genuine entrepreneurial track record — founded and maintains GISCollective as an open-source geo-data platform used in production by real organizations (Green Map), demonstrating builder fluency beyond employment
Current hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, showing active engagement with the AI tooling layer
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no published or widely-recognized AI research, which is explicitly preferred and signals weaker positioning for a role that involves advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI
AI expertise is narrow and very recent (April 2025 to present); the resume lacks evidence of having built or shipped AI-powered products or platforms at scale prior to the current role

No demonstrated experience operating at a director-level principal or staff+ scope — advising partners, shaping cross-org AI strategy, or influencing product roadmaps externally — which are core to this role's responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: Bogdan brings solid full-stack engineering breadth and a genuine founder background, both of which align with the role's preference for entrepreneurial, builder-oriented candidates. However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy position demands recognized, deep AI expertise and a track record of shaping strategy with external partners and customers — neither of which is well-evidenced here. His AI involvement is limited to a single role started just over a year ago, and there is no indication of the cross-organizational influence, executive advisory capacity, or AI platform leadership the role requires at the director level.
